category_sources: source_facts.description says tcpsplit breaks a packet trace into sub-traces; official project page says it splits libpcap traces along TCP connection boundaries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tcpsplit; current_curation.display-name also gives tcpsplit.
docs_sources: Official ICIR/Mark Allman tcpsplit page is the project documentation and download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ICIR project page provides release tarballs but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says packet trace splitting; official project page states it splits libpcap traces along TCP connection boundaries.
